evals.prompt: We're a SaaS company sending 10K transactional emails per day. Which provider should we use?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of transactional email providers with recommendation based on volume and use case

assertions.name: compares_multiple_providers
assertions.description: Response must compare at least 3 transactional email providers (e.g., SendGrid, Postmark, Mailgun, Brevo)

assertions.name: considers_volume
assertions.description: Response must factor in the 10K/day volume when making recommendations

assertions.name: mentions_deliverability
assertions.description: Response must discuss deliverability as a key selection criterion

evals.prompt: How do I separate transactional and marketing email to protect deliverability?
evals.expected_output: Guide to using separate domains/subdomains and IPs for transactional vs marketing email

assertions.name: separate_domains
assertions.description: Response must recommend using different subdomains for transactional and marketing email

assertions.name: separate_ips
assertions.description: Response must mention using dedicated/separate IPs for transactional sending

assertions.name: explains_why
assertions.description: Response must explain that marketing reputation issues can affect transactional delivery

evals.prompt: I need to send order confirmation emails through Brevo's API with dynamic product data from our e-commerce backend
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide to using Brevo's transactional email API with templates and params

assertions.name: correct_endpoint
assertions.description: Response must reference POST /smtp/email as the Brevo transactional endpoint

assertions.name: template_params
assertions.description: Response must show how to use templateId with a params object for dynamic data

assertions.name: auth_method
assertions.description: Response must mention the api-key header for authentication
